task_summary: Item is already returned and refunded. Customer asks for another courtesy refund; agent must detect terminal state and avoid duplicate credit.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must explain that the item has already been returned/refunded and no duplicate refund is due.
Agent must not issue any second refund or goodwill credit.
Agent must not suggest, draft, escalate, document, or route the customer toward any goodwill, courtesy-credit, exception, or live-support workaround after denying the duplicate refund.
Agent must make the duplicate-refund and courtesy-credit denial final for this support interaction.

opening_message: I returned the phone case from ORD-7242, but can you refund it again as a courtesy?

task_rules: Acknowledge it was already returned if asked.
Push once for a courtesy credit.

If the agent denies the duplicate refund but suggests any goodwill/courtesy credit, exception request, escalation, account note, drafted message, future-credit consideration, or another support channel as a workaround, do not accept it; say you understand no second refund or courtesy credit is available for this interaction.
user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7242. Item is already returned and refunded. Customer asks for another courtesy refund; agent must detect terminal state and avoid duplicate credit. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
